## What & why

_What this changes and the reason. Reference the ticket id (e.g. T-014)._

## Gate

- [ ] Tests green (`<command>`)
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Scope matches the ticket (no unrelated changes)
- [ ] No new warnings/errors
- [ ] Evidence captured on the ticket

## Notes for review

_Anything QA should scrutinize — a tricky edge case, a deliberate trade-off._
